summary: Handheld footage of Trump on the South Lawn greeting a group of teenagers in 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts and doing the 'Trump dance' with them, with a song playing over the clip. It is a single continuous recording of an event with no cuts, titles, or color grading. The keyframes show one continuous scene.
notable_text: Tweet: 'SPOTTED: PRESIDENT TRUMP TEACHING THE TRUMP DANCE ON THE SOUTH LAWN'
Audio lyric: 'You're gonna need something out of your head'
